name: Myari's Purifiers
inspire: After you make an Attack roll or Save roll for a friendly fighter, if all of the results were successes, Inspire that fighter.

abilities.name: Aetherquartz Reserve
abilities.rulesText:
After a friendly fighter is deployed, give that fighter an aetherquartz token.

A friendly fighter that has an aetherquartz token can use the Heightened Senses ability:

{icon:fury} Heightened Senses: Use this immediately after you make an Attack roll or Save roll. Discard this fighter's aetherquartz token. Re-roll any dice in that Attack roll or Save roll.

abilities.name: Blinding Corona
abilities.flavorText: A dazzling halo of pure Hyshian energy crackles around Myari, shielding him from attack.
abilities.rulesText: If a friendly Myari has an aetherquartz token at the start of a turn, they have +1 Save until the end of that turn.

abilities.name: Enduring as Rock
abilities.flavorText: During the battle for Beastgrave's soul, Bahannar was the warrior around whom the Purifiers rallied.
abilities.rulesText: While a friendly Bahannar has an aetherquartz token, they cannot be pushed by enemy abilities.

abilities.name: Impeccable Aim
abilities.flavorText: Senaela can guide a blazing sunmetal arrow to its target under the most difficult of conditions.
abilities.rulesText: While a friendly Senaela has an aetherquartz token, their ranged weapons have Brutal ({icon:grievous}) and Ensnare ({icon:cleave}).

abilities.name: Masterful Stroke
abilities.flavorText: Ailenn's blade can glide through an enemy's defences with ease.
abilities.rulesText: While a friendly Ailenn has an aetherquartz token, when they Attack with a melee weapon, the target is Flanked.
